requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — SLSB Conformity, EWRC Licensing, and Donor Procurement Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——SLSB合格评定、EWRC许可及捐助方采购要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——SLSB合格評定、EWRC許可及捐助方採購要求

summary.en: The Sierra Leone Standards Bureau (SLSB), established under the Standards Act, is Sierra Leone's national standards and conformity assessment body. SLSB is in the process of adopting IEC standards as national standards, including IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters). While SLSB's mandatory product conformity scheme coverage for PV inverters was not fully confirmed as of the access date, importers and project developers should verify whether PV inverters fall within any current SLSB mandatory conformity assessment programme. In parallel, EWRC-licensed projects and donor/lender-funded projects (World Bank, AfDB, FCDO, UNOPS) routinely require IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory as a project-level equipment qualification gate. This is the primary safety standard gate in practice for any commercially significant Sierra Leone PV inverter supply.
summary.zh: 依据《标准法》设立的塞拉利昂标准局（SLSB）是塞拉利昂的国家标准和合格评定机构。SLSB正将IEC标准（包括IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2）采纳为国家标准。截至访问日期，SLSB针对光伏逆变器的强制性产品合格评定计划覆盖范围尚未完全确认，进口商和项目开发商应核实光伏逆变器是否属于SLSB当前任何强制性合格评定计划的范围。与此同时，EWRC许可项目和捐助方/贷款方资助项目（世界银行、非洲开发银行、FCDO、UNOPS）通常将来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据作为项目级设备资格门槛。在实践中，这是任何具有商业意义的塞拉利昂光伏逆变器供应的主要安全标准门槛。
summary.zht: 依據《標準法》設立的獅子山標準局（SLSB）是獅子山的國家標準和合格評定機構。SLSB正將IEC標準（包括IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2）採納為國家標準。截至訪問日期，SLSB針對光伏逆變器的強制性產品合格評定計畫覆蓋範圍尚未完全確認，進口商和項目開發商應核實光伏逆變器是否屬於SLSB當前任何強制性合格評定計畫的範圍。與此同時，EWRC許可項目和捐助方/貸款方資助項目（世界銀行、非洲開發銀行、FCDO、UNOPS）通常將來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據作為項目級設備資格門槛。在實踐中，這是任何具有商業意義的獅子山光伏逆變器供應的主要安全標準門槛。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters (IEC standard being adopted by SLSB; required by donor/lender procurement and EWRC-licensed projects)
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements (parent standard; implicitly applicable alongside IEC 62109-2)
Sierra Leone Standards Act — establishes SLSB and its conformity assessment mandate
EWRC licence conditions — equipment technical requirements set per licence for electricity infrastructure projects in Sierra Leone

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2019 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters). GB/T 37408 is assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories and covers safety, electrical performance, and EMC. It shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted by SLSB, EWRC, or donor/lender procurement frameworks as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence. Chinese manufacturers often also hold CQC or CGC voluntary certification based on GB/T 37408, which likewise is not accepted as a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence in Sierra Leone project submissions.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2019（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）。GB/T 37408由中国CNAS认可实验室评估，涵盖安全、电气性能和EMC。其安全意图与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但未与IEC 62109协调，不被SLSB、EWRC或捐助方/贷款方采购框架接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。中国制造商通常还持有基于GB/T 37408的CQC或CGC自愿认证，同样不被接受为塞拉利昂项目提交中IEC 62109-1/-2证据的替代。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2019（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）。GB/T 37408由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估，涵蓋安全、電氣性能和EMC。其安全意圖與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但未與IEC 62109協調，不被SLSB、EWRC或捐助方/貸款方採購框架接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。中國製造商通常還持有基於GB/T 37408的CQC或CGC自願認證，同樣不被接受為獅子山項目提交中IEC 62109-1/-2證據的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification — based on GB/T 37408; not equivalent to IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certification and associated voluntary CQC/CGC certificates do not satisfy IEC 62109-1/-2 safety requirements as required by SLSB-aligned Sierra Leone standards, EWRC project conditions, and donor/lender procurement specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family. Additionally, verify with SLSB whether the inverter falls within a current mandatory conformity scheme — if so, a pre-shipment SLSB-recognised conformity certificate may also be required. Climate suitability evidence for Sierra Leone's tropical humid conditions (high humidity, coastal salt-air, Harmattan dust) should be included in the equipment technical dossier.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T 37408安全认证及相关CQC/CGC自愿证书不满足SLSB对应的塞拉利昂标准、EWRC项目条件及捐助方/贷款方采购规格所要求的IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室取得涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。此外，须向SLSB核实逆变器是否属于当前强制性合格评定计划——如属于，还可能需要装运前SLSB认可的合格证书。设备技术文件中应包含针对塞拉利昂热带潮湿气候条件（高湿度、沿海盐雾、哈马丹沙尘）的气候适用性证据。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T 37408安全認證及相關CQC/CGC自願證書不滿足SLSB對應的獅子山標準、EWRC項目條件及捐助方/貸款方採購規格所要求的IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室取得涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。此外，須向SLSB核實逆變器是否屬於當前強制性合格評定計畫——如屬於，還可能需要裝運前SLSB認可的合格證書。設備技術文件中應包含針對獅子山熱帶潮濕氣候條件（高濕度、沿海鹽霧、哈馬丹沙塵）的氣候適用性證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for EWRC-licensed project submissions and donor/lender-funded project equipment qualification; SLSB mandatory conformity scope for PV inverters should be verified directly with SLSB before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2019 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification is available but not a mandatory market-access requirement under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy IEC 62109-1/-2 safety requirements as applied by SLSB, EWRC, and donor/lender procurement specifications in Sierra Leone. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment for project qualification. Verify with SLSB whether PV inverters are within the current mandatory conformity assessment programme and whether a pre-shipment conformity certificate is required. Include climate derating documentation for Sierra Leone's tropical humid environment (humidity, salt-air, Harmattan dust) in the technical equipment dossier.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器不能满足塞拉利昂SLSB、EWRC和捐助方/贷款方采购规格所适用的IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。请在提交项目资格认定前，安排ILAC认可实验室进行IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。请向SLSB核实光伏逆变器是否属于当前强制性合格评定计划，以及是否需要装运前合格证书。设备技术文件中应包含针对塞拉利昂热带潮湿环境（湿度、盐雾、哈马丹沙尘）的气候降额文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器不能滿足獅子山SLSB、EWRC和捐助方/貸款方採購規格所適用的IEC 62109-1/-2安全要求。請在提交項目資格認定前，安排ILAC認可實驗室進行IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。請向SLSB核實光伏逆變器是否屬於當前強制性合格評定計畫，以及是否需要裝運前合格證書。設備技術文件中應包含針對獅子山熱帶潮濕環境（濕度、鹽霧、哈馬丹沙塵）的氣候降額文件。
